company.name: Prodalim Group
company.description: Prodalim Group is a global leader in the juice and beverage ingredients industry, offering natural solutions including juice concentrates, NFC juices, purees, natural colors, natural fruit aromas (FTNF), citrus fibers, citrus oils, compounds, and dealcoholization solutions to food and beverage manufacturers worldwide. The company operates a vertically integrated supply chain from global fruit sourcing and processing to blending, compounding, R&D, and logistics.
company.ownership: Private; received external capital from I.W.S. BV (advised by Vaalon Capital) in 2016

key_figures.location_count: 14+ named sites across The Netherlands, Israel, Italy, Spain, Germany, Brazil (x2), Vietnam, Poland (x2), China, USA (Florida, New Jersey, California)

locations.description: 2,800 sqm EU main facility housing a compound blending facility for single and multifruit blends and compounds, and an advanced analytical and innovation laboratory for shelf-life, stability, microbiology, and color measurements. Certified FSSC 22000, Organic, Kosher.
Blending factory acquired via the IFB acquisition in 2016. Houses an in-house laboratory supporting production.

28,225 sqm blending plant for single and multifruit blends with large ambient and chilled (-18°C) storage, computerized traceability, sensory, microbiological and physical-chemical laboratories. Certified AEOC, Bonded Warehouse, Organic, IFS Food 6.1. Also serves as EU distribution center for citrus oils. Expanded with a dedicated dealcoholization and aroma recovery site for Solos division (2026).

Munich-based food tech company acquired by Prodalim in 2022. Developed proprietary technology for producing first-class natural aroma concentrates with outstanding concentration and sensory properties, used for FTNF aromas and dealcoholization solutions.

Market leader in red fruit juice and concentrate processing (organic and conventional). Over 15,000 sqm with 16,000–18,000 tons/year processing capacity, 11.5M litre NFC tank storage, 1,000 ton concentrate tank storage, 3 cold stores with 2,500 ton capacity. Certified Organic, IFS, Kosher, SGF/FCS.
Orange processing factory in São Paulo state, built in JV with the Pereira family. Produces NFC, concentrates, citrus oils, and citrus fibers. Has oil folding capabilities.
Additional Brazilian production site for fruit processing operations.
Joint venture production site with Doveco for passion fruit, banana, pineapple, and lychee products.
Processing site in Poland, part of Prodalim's apple and red fruit processing operations.
Additional Polish production or processing facility.
Trading company established in China for the APAC market.

110,420 sqm (27.29 acres) blending site. Blends single and multifruit products, ambient/chilled/frozen storage, in-house laboratory. Hub for citrus oil standardization and distribution. Certified SQF (NSF audited), Organic, Kosher. Also serves as Natural Ingredients Division base.
Tank farm and blending station acquired from ADM.
New US site inaugurated in 2022 as part of North American expansion.

15,700 sqm citrus processing plant in northern Mexico, processing orange, lime, lemon, and grapefruit into NFCs, concentrates, and citrus essential oils. Certified Kosher and Organic. Strategically located near port of Altamira and US border.

Historic French flavor house acquired by Prodalim in December 2025. Specializes in beverage flavor systems, aromatic distillates, and tailor-made solutions. Now part of Prodalim's Specialty Ingredients & Solutions division.
Newly inaugurated Natural Colors R&D Center in Slovenia, reinforcing commitment to clean-label innovation and high-performance natural color solutions.

partnerships.name: Doveco (Vietnam)
partnerships.description: Joint venture partnership for the production of passion fruit, banana, pineapple, and lychee products at a facility in Ninh Binh, Vietnam.

partnerships.name: Jugosa (Mexico)
partnerships.description: Strategic joint venture with Mexican organic citrus processor Jugosa for processing organic orange, lemon, and lime.

partnerships.name: Capsoil
partnerships.description: Partnership to bring self-emulsified powder technology (oil-based powders) to the food and beverage market.

partnerships.name: Rimuss & Strada Wein AG (Switzerland)
partnerships.description: Agreement signed to build the first full-service dealcoholization center in Switzerland using Solos' proprietary aroma recovery technology.

partnerships.name: SAI Platform
partnerships.description: Prodalim joined the SAI Platform as a member in 2019, supporting sustainable agriculture initiatives.

colours.name: Red
colours.description: Red and deep red hues sourced from multiple fruit and vegetable pigments, used across a wide range of food and beverage categories. Includes both coloring foodstuffs and concentrated pigment extracts.
key_properties: Available as juice concentrate or extract
Anthocyanin-based pigments offer broad shade range
Can be labeled as food ingredient (not E-number) when used as coloring foodstuff
challenges: Anthocyanin pH sensitivity (shifts hue from red at low pH to blue/purple at high pH)
Shade instability in neutral or alkaline matrices

colours.name: Purple
colours.description: Purple tones derived from anthocyanin-rich fruit and vegetable sources, often overlapping with red depending on pH conditions.
challenges: pH-dependent hue shift (purple to blue at higher pH)
Potential off-notes from some vegetable sources

colours.name: Blue
colours.description: Blue colorants derived primarily from spirulina algae, increasingly in demand for clean-label formulations.

colours.name: Green
colours.description: Green colorants sourced from spirulina, offering natural plant-based coloring solutions.

colours.name: Yellow
colours.description: Yellow colorants derived from natural plant sources including safflower, used in clean-label food and beverage formulations.

colours.name: Orange
colours.description: Orange shades delivered by carotenoid-rich sources, particularly orange carrot, offering stable and vibrant hues for food and beverage applications.
key_properties: Good heat stability relative to anthocyanins
challenges: Fat-solubility may require emulsification for aqueous applications
Light sensitivity over extended shelf life

colours.name: Brown
colours.description: Brown colorants derived from fruit-based sources such as apple and malt, suitable for savory, bakery and other applications requiring warm brown tones.
challenges: Shade consistency may vary with batch and source

products.name: Natural Colors Portfolio (NaturaPro / VivaPro)
products.description: A portfolio of natural colors including coloring foodstuffs and natural color additives (pigment extracts such as anthocyanins and carotenoids), derived from fruits, vegetables, algae, flowers, and spices. Positioned against artificial colors for clean-label food and beverage applications. Supported by a dedicated Natural Colors R&D Center in Slovenia inaugurated in 2026.
features: Two product lines: coloring foodstuffs (labeled as food ingredient, not E-number) and natural color additives (selectively extracted pigments, used as additives)
Sources include beetroot, black carrot, red radish, purple sweet potato, spirulina, safflower, orange carrot, apple, malt
Proprietary production process for coloring foodstuffs: water extraction, filtration, pasteurization, concentration
Natural color additive process: solvent extraction, purification, concentration, drying
Supported by global sourcing and optimal access to natural product side-streams
benefits: Clean label – coloring foodstuffs labeled as food ingredients, not E-numbers
Free from synthetic chemicals
Supports regulatory compliance and reduces reformulation risk
Broad application versatility across beverages, dairy, bakery, confectionery, savory, plant-based
Comprehensive R&D support and cutting-edge product development capabilities

products.name: Natural Fruit Aromas – FTNF (From The Named Fruit)
products.description: Proprietary technology platform (Flavologic) that collects, standardizes, and concentrates aromas from fruit juice processing side-streams. Delivers highly concentrated, 100% natural fruit aroma extracts for use in flavor formulation, beverage development, and dealcoholization aroma add-back.
features: Proprietary Flavologic technology for aroma recovery and concentration
Stabilization of sensitive and unique fruit aroma profiles
Highly concentrated extracts of 20+ fruit types including orange, pineapple, passionfruit, strawberry, peach, raspberry, mango, apple, blueberry, and more
FTNF Boosters available for FTNF product enhancement
Essence oils and water phase recovery from juice concentration
Customizable flavor profiles upon request
Signature Notes capability to isolate and replicate brand-unique aroma
benefits: 100% natural and pure product aroma
Clean-label opportunities
Enables dealcoholization solutions while preserving original aromas
Reduces dependency on synthetic flavors
Building blocks for complex flavor systems

products.name: FTNS Spirit Extracts (From The Named Spirit)
products.description: Alcohol-free spirit extracts developed using real distilled spirits, preserving the aromatic complexity of iconic spirits. Available in multiple concentrations for flexible formulation.
features: Derived from real distilled spirits (Brandy, Scotch Blended Whiskey, Scotch Peated Whisky, Rum, London Dry Gin)
Available in three concentrations: 1:1,000, 1:2,000, 1:10,000
Alcohol-free, heat-stable, clean-label
benefits: True-to-origin flavor without alcohol
Suitable for no/low alcohol beverage formulation
Enables authentic spirit flavor in RTD cocktails, mocktails, and premium non-alcoholic spirits

products.name: Citrus Fibers
products.description: Plant-based, multifunctional fibers derived from citrus peel byproducts (oranges, limes, lemons), produced through an effluent-free, zero-waste upcycling process at Prodalim's Brazil facility. Available in four specialized grades targeting different application needs.
features: Four product types: Meat & meat alternatives (616025022), Bakery/soups/sauces/ice cream (616025033), Beverages/dairy (616025044), and a pet food grade
Superior water holding capacity (WHC 20.0–25.0 g/g vs. 6.0–16.5 g/g for competitors)
High soluble fiber content (37% pectin/others) vs. competitors (11–27%)
High L color value (>86 vs. <70 for competitors) indicating lighter color
Effluent-free production process
Heat stable – maintains properties at high temperatures
Freeze-thaw stable
benefits: Clean label – no artificial additives
Multifunctional: thickening, emulsification, moisture retention, gelling, fat reduction, dietary fiber enrichment
Sustainable – upcycled from citrus waste
Improves texture, mouthfeel, and stability across diverse applications
Supports fat and sodium reduction in meat products

products.name: Compounds
products.description: Tailor-made beverage compound solutions produced at Prodalim's Rotterdam and other facilities, offering complete beverage formulations including flavor, color, and mouthfeel. Designed to reduce customer production complexity.
features: Modular, flexible formulation approach
Wide range of fruit and flavor combinations
Includes natural colors and aromas
Available for juices, nectars, still drinks, smoothies, sports drinks, syrups, fruit wines, CSDs, water+, beer mixes, dairy alternatives, mocktails, and functional beverages
Brand new compound factory and R&D facility in Rotterdam
benefits: One-stop shop beverage solution
Reduces production complexity for customers
Tailor-designed to unique taste and market requirements
Access to go-to-market concept innovations

products.name: Juice Solutions (Juice Concentrates, NFC Juice, Puree, Pulp Cells)
products.description: Core portfolio of fruit juice ingredients including concentrates, NFC juices, purees, pulp cells, and organic variants, covering over 20 fruit types sourced from more than 35 countries. Supplied in frozen and aseptic formats.
features: Concentrates produced by vacuum evaporation (up to 7x reduction in volume/weight)
NFC juice mechanically extracted from ripe fresh fruit, no additives, gently pasteurized
Purees obtained by grinding, pressing, sieving – rich in nutritional fiber, minerals, vitamins
Pulp cells: membranous vesicles separated from freshly squeezed juice for texture and mouthfeel enhancement
Organic variants available across most fruit types
Multifruit blends: tailor-made to customer recipe or developed in-house
Fruit bases: high-concentrated tailor-made bases for nectars and soft drinks
benefits: Year-round supply from global multi-origin sourcing
Eliminates customer dependency on single source
100% fulfilled contracts regardless of market conditions
Just-in-time delivery from buffer stock
Organic options available

products.name: Citrus Oils
products.description: Cold-pressed citrus essential oils and specialty oil products produced directly at Prodalim's Brazil and Mexico facilities and standardized at the Winter Garden, Florida hub. Supplied globally.
features: Cold-pressed, 100% natural, no heat or chemical treatment
Types: Orange, Lemon, Lime, Grapefruit (white & red), Mandarin/Tangerine
Products include: Cold pressed oil, oil phase, water phase, D'limonene, terpenes
Customized specialties: folded oils, clear folded oils, fractional distillation specialties
Standardized and batched to customer specifications at Florida hub
European distribution via Prodalim Iberia (Valencia, Spain)
benefits: Direct farm-to-processing vertical integration
Consistent year-round supply
Highly customizable to specification

products.name: René Laurent Flavor Solutions
products.description: Heritage French flavor house (founded 1885, Grasse) acquired by Prodalim in December 2025. Specializes in beverage flavor systems, aromatic distillates, syrups, liqueur bases, and tailor-made flavor solutions across alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverage segments.
features: Natural and nature-identical flavors
Extracts and aromatic molecules
Syrups, liqueur bases, and distillates
Beverage compounds and flavor systems
Functional and clean-label formulations
Solutions for both non-alcoholic and alcoholic beverages
Over 130 years of sensory craftsmanship combined with advanced R&D
benefits: Authentic flavor expression
Turnkey beverage solution capability
Combines French artistry with Prodalim's global sourcing and aroma recovery expertise
Supports vertically integrated beverage solution platform

products.name: Solos Dealcoholization Solutions
products.description: Prodalim's alcohol-free innovation division, offering proprietary dealcoholization and aroma recovery technology for wine, beer, and spirits companies. Operational in six global markets including USA, Switzerland, and Spain.
features: Proprietary aroma recovery technology (Flavologic-based)
Full-service dealcoholization centers
New dedicated dealcoholization and aroma recovery site in Valencia, Spain (2026)
US pilot plant launched (2025)
Switzerland full-service center in development with Rimuss & Strada Wein AG
benefits: Preserves original aromas during dealcoholization
Enables wine, beer, and spirits producers to enter the no/low alcohol segment
First-class sensory quality in dealcoholized products
Award-winning results (Berliner Wein Trophy gold medal for dealcoholized wine using Flavologic technology)

products.name: Power 2 Nature® Compounding Platform
products.description: Prodalim's overarching compounding and innovation platform that integrates natural expertise, fruit heritage, backward integration, and modular formulation capabilities to create customized, sustainable natural solutions for food and beverage customers worldwide.
features: 30+ years of raw material sourcing and processing expertise
Backward integration capturing juice, oils, aromas, water phases, and cells from fruit
Zero waste philosophy via upscaling of fruit side-streams
Modular, flexible approach to compounding
Go-to-market concept development and category innovation
Sourcing from 42+ countries, access to over 1 million tons of fruit per year
benefits: One-stop shop from sourcing to finished formulation
Zero waste and sustainable ingredient development
Collaborative product development with customers
Access to exclusive raw material side-streams for natural colors, aromas, and fibers

industries.name: Beverage – Juice
industries.description: Core market for Prodalim, supplying fruit juice concentrates, NFC juices, purees, compounds, aromas, and natural colors for juice and nectar manufacturers globally.
consumer_trends: Sugar reduction and low/no sugar positioning
Super fruit and functional juice concepts
needs: Natural colors and aromas for label positioning
Citrus fiber for texture and mouthfeel

industries.name: Beverage – Carbonated Soft Drinks
industries.description: Prodalim offers natural solutions to elevate CSD products including compounds, natural aromas, essential oils, and natural colors, targeting consumers seeking less artificial, more natural options.
consumer_trends: Demand for no artificial colors and flavors
Botanical and functional ingredients in CSD
needs: Natural color stability in carbonated, acidic matrices
solutions: Compounds including JUIZZZY premium sparkling lemonades

industries.name: Beverage – Beer
industries.description: Solutions for beer producers including juice ingredients, natural aromas, compounds for beer mixes and radlers, and dealcoholization solutions for non-alcoholic beer development.
consumer_trends: Hard seltzers and beer mix alternatives
needs: Natural aromas and fruit compounds for beer mixes

industries.name: Beverage – Wine
industries.description: Prodalim offers fermented juice-based fruit wines and dealcoholization technology for wine producers seeking to expand into the no/low alcohol wine category.
consumer_trends: Rising demand for alcohol-free and low-alcohol wine

industries.name: Beverage – Sports & Energy Drinks
industries.description: Prodalim provides natural compounds, juice solutions, and functional ingredients for sports and energy drink manufacturers targeting health-conscious active consumers.
consumer_trends: Demand for natural energy drinks without artificial additives
Isotonic drinks with real juice content
needs: Natural colors and flavors without synthetic inputs
solutions: Compounds (isotonic drinks, energy drinks, hydration drinks)

industries.name: Beverage – Spirits & Mocktails
industries.description: Prodalim serves spirits producers and the growing no/low alcohol segment with flavor systems, dealcoholization solutions, cocktail compounds, and spirit extracts.
consumer_trends: No/low alcohol trend driving mocktail and RTD growth

industries.name: Dairy & Dairy Alternative
industries.description: Prodalim provides plant-based drink concepts, fruit-based compounds, citrus fibers, and natural colors for dairy alternative and dairy manufacturers.
consumer_trends: Plant-based milk alternatives with high juice content
needs: Natural colors stable in dairy matrices

industries.name: Bakery
industries.description: Prodalim supports bakery manufacturers with natural juice ingredients, essential oils, citrus fibers for moisture retention, and natural colors for product differentiation.
consumer_trends: Functional fiber enrichment in baked goods

industries.name: Confectionery
industries.description: Prodalim offers natural colors, juice solutions, and essential oils for confectionery applications requiring vibrant, stable colors and natural flavor.
consumer_trends: Demand for no artificial colors in confectionery

industries.name: Ice Cream
industries.description: Prodalim provides natural fruit ingredients, compounds, aromas, citrus fibers (for freeze-thaw stability), and natural colors for ice cream manufacturers.
consumer_trends: Natural and fruit-flavored ice cream growth
needs: Natural colors stable in frozen applications

industries.name: Baby Food
industries.description: Prodalim supplies natural fruit ingredients and compounds for baby food manufacturers, emphasizing safety, naturalness, and nutritional integrity.
consumer_trends: Growing demand for 100% natural and clean-label baby food

industries.name: Savory (Sauces, Condiments, Meat)
industries.description: Prodalim offers fruit-based juice ingredients, citrus fibers (for emulsification and texture), essential oils, and natural colors for savory food manufacturers.
consumer_trends: Natural and clean-label sauces and condiments

industries.name: Pet Food
industries.description: Citrus fibers from Prodalim are applied in pet food for moisture retention, texture, binding, and digestive fiber content.
consumer_trends: Natural and functional ingredients in pet nutrition

innovations.name: Flavologic FTNF Aroma Recovery Technology
innovations.description: Proprietary ground-breaking technology developed by Flavologic GmbH (acquired 2022) that collects, standardizes, and concentrates aromas from fruit juice processing side-streams to the highest quality. Also enables aroma preservation during dealcoholization of wine, beer, and spirits.
features: Stabilization of sensitive, unique fruit aroma profiles
Highly concentrated aroma extracts from 20+ fruit types
Applicable to dealcoholized beverage aroma add-back
Zero-waste: uses fruit processing side-streams
Basis for FTNF Boosters and Signature Notes product lines
benefits: 100% natural aroma extracts
Clean-label eligible
Enables authentic flavor in dealcoholized beverages
Award-winning results (Berliner Wein Trophy gold medal for dealcoholized wine)

innovations.name: Citrus Fibers – Next Generation
innovations.description: Innovative plant-based, multifunctional ingredient derived from upcycled citrus peel byproducts, produced via a zero-waste, effluent-free process at Prodalim Brazil. Outperforms competitors on key parameters including water holding capacity, soluble fiber content, and color.
features: Effluent-free production process
Four specialized grades for meat, bakery, beverages/dairy, and pet food
Superior WHC: 20.0–25.0 g/g
High soluble fiber (pectin) content: 37%
High L color value (>86) – lighter color than competitors
Heat stable and freeze-thaw stable
benefits: Clean label and sustainable
Enables fat and sodium reduction
Improves texture, mouthfeel, emulsification across multiple categories
Upcycles citrus processing waste

innovations.name: Solos – Alcohol-Free Innovation Division
innovations.description: New brand and division launched in 2024 representing excellence in non-alcoholic beverages, focused on proprietary dealcoholization and aroma recovery technology. Expanded to six global markets by 2025.
features: Proprietary aroma recovery and add-back technology
Dedicated dealcoholization sites in Valencia Spain (2026) and US pilot plant (2025)
Switzerland full-service center in development
Expanded to USA as sixth global market (2025)
benefits: Authentic aroma-preserved dealcoholized beverages
Enables wine, beer, and spirits producers to enter no/low alcohol category without compromising quality

innovations.name: FTNS Spirit Extracts (From The Named Spirit)
innovations.description: Alcohol-free extracts developed from real distilled spirits (Brandy, Scotch Blended Whiskey, Scotch Peated Whisky, Rum, London Dry Gin) preserving nuanced aromatic complexity for use in non-alcoholic formulations.
features: Derived from real spirits
Alcohol-free, heat-stable, clean-label
Three concentrations: 1:1,000, 1:2,000, 1:10,000
Five spirit types available
benefits: True-to-origin spirit flavor without alcohol
Supports growing no/low alcohol beverage innovation
Versatile application in beverages, bakery, confectionery, and perfumes

innovations.name: Natural Colors R&D Center – Slovenia
innovations.description: New Natural Colors R&D Center inaugurated in Slovenia in March 2026, reinforcing Prodalim's commitment to clean-label innovation and high-performance natural color solutions.
features: Dedicated natural colors research and development facility
Supports high-performance color innovation and application testing
benefits: Accelerates natural color product development
Strengthens competitive position in natural colors market

innovations.name: Prebiotic Soda Concepts
innovations.description: Fruit-based prebiotic soda concepts developed by Prodalim to address consumer demand for functional beverages supporting gut health, introduced in 2025.
features: Kombucha-style fermented formulations with 5% juice content
Gut health benefit via probiotics
All natural – no artificial flavors or colors
No added sugar, low calorie
benefits: Supports gut microbiome and digestion
Functional and natural alternative to sugary sodas
Clean-label

innovations.name: Capsoil Oil-Based Powder Technology
innovations.description: Partnership with Capsoil to bring self-emulsified powder technology (oil-based powders) to the food and beverage market, enabling novel powder formats for oil-containing ingredients.
features: Self-emulsified powder format
Enables oil-based ingredients in powder applications
benefits: New product development opportunities for customers
Improved convenience and formulation flexibility

sustainability.strategy: Prodalim's sustainability strategy focuses on building a fully sustainable supply chain by 2030, integrating circular economy principles, advancing ESG goals across environment, social, and governance dimensions, and aligning with global environmental and social commitments. The company published its first Sustainability Report in December 2025 and joined the Science Based Targets Initiative (SBTi) in February 2025.
targets: 100% alignment on sustainability of priority fruits by 2030 (10% by 2020, 50% by 2025, 100% by 2030)
initiatives: Joined Science Based Targets Initiative (SBTi) in February 2025
Published first Sustainability Report in December 2025
Awarded EcoVadis Gold Medal in recognition of sustainability achievements (2023)
Included in IFU Sustainability Report 2025 for the second consecutive year
Joined SAI Platform as member in 2019
Solar panel expansion at Valencia, Spain site (2022)
Citrus fibers upcycled from citrus peel byproducts via effluent-free production process
Natural fruit aromas capture valuable compounds from fruit processing side-streams (zero waste)
Juice solutions leverage byproducts from fruit processing
Prodalim Rauner GmbH: use of condensed process water for cleaning, pomace as fertilizer, conversion from fuel oil to gas, aseptic filling enabling storage at 0–5°C vs. -18°C
Long-term fair cooperation with growers and suppliers
key_metrics: Solar panels expanded at Valencia site (2022)
